heading: Purchase of American-made equipment and products
label: 7012 Purchase of American-made equipment and products

children.heading: Sense of Congress
children.label: a Sense of Congress
children.text: It is the sense of the Congress that, to the greatest extent practicable, all equipment and products purchased using funds made available pursuant to this chapter should be American-made.

children.heading: Notice requirement
children.label: b Notice requirement
children.text: In providing financial assistance to, or entering into any contract with, any entity using funds made available pursuant to this chapter, the Secretary, to the greatest extent practicable, shall provide to such entity a notice describing the statement made in subsection (a) by the Congress.
